product: Git folders now supports multiple Git credentials per user (Public Preview)
tagline: Use the UI to add and manage multiple Git credentials in the workspace, from one or multiple Git providers.
what_it_does: Use the UI to add and manage multiple Git credentials in the workspace, from one or multiple Git providers. This page describes how to configure Git integration for Databricks Git folders, including credentials, network connectivity, and security features. To create a Git folder and start working with Git operations, see Create and manage Git folders.
why_it_matters: Saving a new list overwrites the existing allowlist.
plain_summary: Use the UI to add and manage multiple Git credentials in the workspace, from one or multiple Git providers. This page describes how to configure Git integration for Databricks Git folders, including credentials, network connectivity, and security features.
key_takeaway: Use the UI to add and manage multiple Git credentials in the workspace, from one or multiple Git providers.
